title: Russell Hobbs 20 Piece Cutlery Set- Florence, Stylish Tableware for 4 People with Dessert Forks, 18/0 Quality Stainless Steel, Mirror Polish Finish, Comfortable to Hold, Dishwasher Safe
features: Add a touch of sparkle to your dinner table with the timeless 20-piece Florence cutlery set from Russell Hobbs which is made to last.
Crafted from 18/0 stainless steel, the 4-person tableware set will suit a variety of kitchen decors with its sleek contemporary look.
The flatware set contains 4 forks, 4 knives, 4 dessert spoons, 4 dessert forks and 4 teaspoons, great for providing at dinner parties.
With over 65 years of experience supplying British households with high quality goods, Russell Hobbs design kitchenware to last.
With a stylish modern design that you will want to last, the Florence 20-piece cutlery set has a convenient 25-year guarantee. *
description: Add a touch of sparkle to your dinner table with the timeless 20-piece Florence cutlery set by Russell Hobbs which is made to last. Expertly crafted from high quality 18/0 stainless steel with a long-lasting shine, this 4-person tableware set will suit a variety of kitchen decors with its sleek contemporary look. A staple for any dining table, this four-place flatware set contains 4 forks, 4 knives, 4 dessert spoons, 4 dessert forks and 4 teaspoons, great to provide to guests at dinner parties.

specifications_table.Included components: ‎4 x Dessert Fork, 4 x Forks, 4 x Knives, 4 x Teaspoon, 4x Tablespoon
